description: Unraid host overview (node_exporter). Select the host in the Instance variable; this dashboard avoids hard-coded IPs and supports multi-host use.

panels.description: Whether Prometheus can scrape this node-exporter instance (1=UP, 0=DOWN).
panels.title: node_exporter Up

panels.description: Scrape health for the selected instance. When up=0 the line sits at 1 (interpreted as failing).
panels.title: Scrape Failing (1 = failing)

panels.description: How long it takes Prometheus to scrape node-exporter.
panels.title: Scrape Duration (s)

panels.description: Number of samples returned each scrape.
panels.title: Scrape Samples

panels.description: Scrape duration as a percentage of the scrape interval. Sustained >50% means you're spending a lot of the interval just scraping; near 100% risks gaps/staleness.
panels.title: Scrape Duration (% of interval)

panels.description: Sample count compared to its recent baseline (1h avg). Drops often mean exporter flags/collectors changed, permissions changed, or relabeling started dropping series.
panels.title: Scrape Samples (ratio vs 1h baseline)

panels.description: Inbound/outbound throughput by interface (excluding loopback).
panels.title: Network Throughput (MB/s)

panels.description: Network errors per second (rx/tx) for selected interface(s).
panels.title: Network Errors & Drops (per second)

panels.description: Primary LAN bridge status for Unraid.
panels.title: LAN Link (br0)

panels.description: Bond interface status (redundancy/aggregation).
panels.title: Bond Status (bond0)

panels.description: Percent of memory available (MemAvailable / MemTotal).
panels.title: Memory Available (%)

panels.description: Swap usage percentage.
panels.title: Swap Usage (%)

panels.description: Overall CPU utilization (1 - idle).
panels.title: CPU Utilization (%)

panels.description: Time CPU spends waiting on IO.
panels.title: CPU IO Wait (%)

panels.description: Load Average (1m/5m/15m)
panels.title: Load Average (1m/5m/15m)

panels.description: Logical CPU cores detected.
panels.title: CPU Cores

panels.description: Reachability of Unraid node-exporter. Alerts fire if this transitions to DOWN.
panels.title: Host Availability

panels.description: How long the Unraid host has been up (seconds since boot).
panels.title: Uptime

panels.description: Percent used for each real filesystem.
panels.title: Disk Used (%) by Mount

panels.description: Free space in GiB per mount.
panels.title: Disk Free (GiB) by Mount

panels.description: Percent of free inodes.
panels.title: Inodes Free (%) by Mount

panels.description: Shows if any monitored filesystem is read-only.
panels.title: Filesystem Read-Only (Any)

title: Unraid – Back of House Overview
